description: The Exodii Datamaster want you to find some manuals for unarmed martial arts styles.  The list is five specific books: <color_yellow>Kodokan Judo</color>; <color_yellow>The Shōtōkan Karate Handbook</color>; <color_yellow>The Spirit of Aikido</color>; <color_yellow>Practical Pugilism</color>; <color_yellow>The Ultimate Guide to Kickboxing</color>.

The Exodii Datamaster want you to find some manuals for armed martial arts styles.  The list is five specific books: <color_yellow>Practical Eskrima</color>;< color_yellow>Essence of Ninjutsu</color>; <color_yellow>Complete Krav Maga</color>; <color_yellow>The Indonesian Warrior</color>; and <color_yellow>The Modern Swordsman</color>.
